call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently filled out a form online regarding a Personal Loan. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Oh, hi. I'm alright. 
Agent: Great! So, based on the information you provided, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: Well, I was mostly looking at consolidating some credit card debt. It's just… getting a little high. 
Agent: Absolutely, that's a very common reason people take out these loans. And with 8.99%, you'd likely save quite a bit in interest. We can tailor the repayment schedule to fit your budget. Like, we can go up to 60 months. 
Eleanor: 60 months? That sounds… long. 
Agent: It gives you flexibility! Lower monthly payments. We can also do 36 or 24. What feels comfortable? 
Eleanor: Hmm. Maybe 36. What would the monthly payment be at 36 months? 
Agent: Let me calculate that for you… Okay, it would be approximately $313 per month. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Yeah, that's… doable. What are the fees associated with the loan? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $200. It's deducted from the loan amount, so you actually receive $9800. 
Eleanor: Okay. That's… alright. I think I'm ready to move forward. 
Agent: Fantastic! Let's get some final details confirmed…

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Financial Freedom. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're offering a $2500 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, this card offers rewards points and… 
Robert: Look, I'm retired. I don't need another credit card. And I want my number removed from your list. Don't call me again! *click*

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a Personal Loan. Your friend, Michael, referred you. 
Jessica: Oh, hey! Yeah, Michael mentioned you guys. I'm thinking about a loan for a down payment on a car. 
Agent: Excellent! We can definitely help with that. Based on your credit profile, we are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%. 
Jessica: Wow, that's… really good. What are the terms? 
Agent: We offer flexible terms, from 24 to 72 months. What kind of monthly payment are you looking for? 
Jessica: I'd like to keep it under $300 if possible. 
Agent: Let me see… With a 60-month term, your monthly payment would be approximately $290. 
Jessica: That sounds perfect! Are there any prepayment penalties? 
Agent: No, there are no prepayment penalties. You can pay it off early without any extra fees. There is a one-time origination fee of $300, deducted from the loan amount. 
Jessica: Okay, that's fine. So, I'd receive $14,700? 
Agent: Exactly. And you'll have access to those funds within 24-48 hours. 
Jessica: Great! Let's do it. What do I need to do next? 
Agent: Wonderful! I just need to verify a few details and then we'll send over the loan agreement for your signature…

Agent: Hello, David? This is Lisa calling from Financial Solutions. I see you expressed interest in our Signature Credit Card online. 
David: Yeah, I was just checking out options. I'm self-employed, so getting approved for cards can be tricky. 
Agent: We specialize in working with self-employed individuals. We are pre-approving you for a $5000 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 14.99%. 
David: 14.99… that's a bit high, isn't it? 
Agent: It's competitive for someone with a credit score in the good range, and being self-employed. The card offers 2% cashback on all purchases. 
David: Cashback is good. What's the annual fee? 
Agent: The annual fee is $99. 
David: Hmm. Okay. I'm still considering a few options. Can you send me some information about the card via email? 
Agent: Absolutely! I can send you a detailed brochure outlining all the benefits and terms. What's your email address? 
David: It's david.lee@email.com. 
Agent: Perfect. You'll receive that within the next hour. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions.

Agent: Hello, Ms. Rodriguez? This is Kevin calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a Personal Loan… 
Maria: (Interrupting) You guys called me *yesterday*! I told you I'm not interested! 
Agent: Ma'am, we are pre-approving you for a $3000 Personal Loan at a rate of 24.99%… 
Maria: 24.99?! Are you serious? I can't afford that! And I've already told you, I don't want your loan! Take my number off your list *now*! 
Agent: But… 
Maria: *click*
